intentional_test_features: Red herrings: explosive full-body urticaria and flushing raise the spectre of anaphylaxis.
Important-not-to-miss: anaphylaxis must be actively screened (airway/breathing/circulation/GI) with a very low threshold to escalate.
Reverse-triage nuance: isolated cutaneous urticaria without airway/CVS involvement should NOT trigger a reflexive ambulance, but any systemic feature means 000.
Commission trap: IM promethazine and other agents given in person do not translate to remote injections; the safe remote step is H1 antihistamine up-dosing and cooling.
Telehealth limits: airway/chest examination and BP cannot be done remotely, though the anaphylaxis symptom screen is history-obtainable.

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date)
